name: Samsung
collaborationStyle: product launch, device review, campaign integration
notes: Reserved for large channels; typically goes through agency intermediaries

collaborationStyle: PC build integration, benchmark showcase, performance campaign

name: LG
collaborationStyle: product review, setup showcase, home tech integration

name: Microsoft
collaborationStyle: software tutorial, Surface review, productivity integration, campaign
notes: Wide range of sponsorable products (Surface, Xbox, Office, Copilot); more creator-accessible than Apple

name: Anker
collaborationStyle: product review, unboxing, setup/desk tour integration
notes: Extremely creator-friendly; one of the most accessible mid-tier tech sponsors; fast approvals

name: NordVPN
collaborationStyle: privacy story, mid-roll segment, evergreen integration
notes: One of the most prolific YouTube sponsors across all tech and non-tech niches; very easy integration

name: Squarespace
collaborationStyle: website showcase, portfolio story, mid-roll segment
notes: Universal fit for any tech creator with a personal brand or portfolio; perennial YouTube sponsor

name: Logitech
collaborationStyle: peripheral review, desk setup showcase, productivity integration
notes: Covers mice, keyboards, webcams, and streamgear; wide fit across tech, gaming, and productivity creators

name: Dashlane
collaborationStyle: cybersecurity story, password manager demo, mid-roll
notes: Password manager with active creator program; good alternative angle to NordVPN for privacy-focused content

name: Webflow
collaborationStyle: no-code tutorial, portfolio build, design workflow showcase
notes: Strong fit for web design, no-code, and developer-adjacent tech creators; high CPM due to B2B audience

name: Ugreen
collaborationStyle: setup tour, cable/hub review, desk organization
notes: Aggressively sponsoring tech and setup creators; fast approval, competitive rates

name: Elgato
collaborationStyle: streaming setup review, creator gear showcase, studio tour
notes: Capture cards, stream decks, and lighting for creators; ideal for YouTube/streaming setup content

name: Roborock
collaborationStyle: smart home review, product demo, home tech integration
notes: Robot vacuum brand actively sponsoring tech and lifestyle creators; strong demo potential

name: Incogni
collaborationStyle: privacy story, data removal demo, digital safety segment
notes: Data removal service by Surfshark; rising fast as a YouTube sponsor in tech and general creator space

name: Figma
